productDisplayName: Puma Men Drift White Casual Shoes
description: These stylish Drift cat 4 CF shoes from puma with a motorsport friendly design are great for urban wear. Their attractive low-profile design looks great when teamed with jeans and tees.UpperSynthetic leather uppers for durability and protectionVelcro flap closure for snug Fit and easy insertion and removal of the feetLightly padded collar and tongue for greater comfortTextile lining for extra comfortBrand name embossed on the tongue, cat logo on the side and cat logo on the heel counterFormstripe on the lateral side MidsoleEco-friendly EcoOrtholite insole gives breathability, moisture control, anti-microbial properties, and long term cushioning Phylon midsole for greater lightweight comfortOutsoleNon-slip rubber outsole in a tyre tread pattern for greater tractionFlex grooves for greater flexibility of the feetSole extending to heel counter for greater protection of the heelshoe careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash
